title: ApiTestsAppsettings
description: Schema for the appsettings.Test.json file generated by the dotnet-test-api skill. Secret fields must be placeholders of the form REPLACE_VIA_ENV_<FullKey>.

ApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the API under test. Default generated: http://localhost:5000. Override via env var ApiBaseUrl.

BaseUrl.description: Base URL of the auth service. Default generated may be REPLACE_VIA_ENV_Auth__BaseUrl if unknown.

Email.description: MUST be the placeholder literal. Real value via env var Auth__Email.

Password.description: MUST be the placeholder literal. Real value via env var Auth__Password.
